SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED APR-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, JAIME

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, JAIME $446.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $551.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-25-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT.
